creator: pgj@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Would you please update your port?  About 5 weeks ago, I have updated
the port to 2.2.0, and also added a warning for users of 6.x systems [1]
(see the Makefile [2]):


``If you experience problems during the configure process, please add
the following lines to your /etc/libmap.conf configuration file:


libpthread.so.1 libthr.so.1

libpthread.so.2 libthr.so.2

libkse.so.3 libthr.so.3
       ''

As far as I know, that helps.  For your information, reasons are
explained on the current@ mailing list [3].

Cheers,
:g


[1] http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/cvs-ports/2009-February/164946.html
[2]
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/cvsweb.cgi/ports/devel/darcs/Makefile?rev=1.52;content-type=text%2Fplain
[3]
http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-current/2008-March/084248.html
